title: How do you travel?
objective: Nombrar medios de transporte y explicar cómo te desplazas en situaciones cotidianas.

activities.prompt: You travel on rails in a ___.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el transporte que usa vías de tren.

activities.feedback_correct: Usamos by bus para indicar el medio de transporte.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la preposición de medios de transporte.
Busca el lugar de salida de los aviones.

activities.instruction: Une el transporte con el lugar relacionado.
activities.feedback_correct: Relacionas transportes con lugares de salida o llegada.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa dónde esperas o tomas cada medio de transporte.

activities.feedback_correct: La estructura es sujeto + travel + by + transporte.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca I al principio y by train al final.

activities.prompt: I usually go to work by bus, but today I am taking a taxi because it is raining.
activities.question: How is the speaker going to work today?
activities.feedback_correct: Today I am taking a taxi indica el transporte de hoy.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la parte después de but today.

activities.prompt: I go by bus. She travels by train. We take a taxi. They fly by plane.
evaluation_criteria: clear by bus and by train
activities.feedback_correct: Los medios de transporte se entienden claramente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica train sin añadir una vocal final y diferencia bus de buzz.

activities.prompt: Marta travels from Madrid to Valencia by train. She leaves at 8:00 and arrives at 10:00. From the station, she takes a taxi to her hotel.
activities.question: How does Marta go from the station to the hotel?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice she takes a taxi to her hotel.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el transporte después de From the station.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about how you travel to work, school, shops, and one other place. Include reasons for two choices.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes explicar cómo te desplazas y por qué.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa by + transporte y on foot para caminar.

activities.instruction: Planifica un trayecto con la IA.
activities.prompt: You need to travel across a city. Ask the AI about transport options, choose one, and explain how you will reach the final destination.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de transporte y elegir una ruta sencilla.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra opciones visuales y compara tiempo y facilidad con frases A1.
